text.message: It's not bad, a lot depends on what I get on the way back
indded its a good place to be 1st pick- perfect ows :)
Played same starting setup last game, ended up going coast on the way back with no good port and eventually lost :D
coast pick is usually the remaining pick for 1st player
Why not 8 5 10 red? You get wheat with next settle
looks like you have many choice spots, black
Yes, but not as good as your position :)
you have wood supply and port wood
You just gave the win, thanks
He got the 2 resources he needed
red, can you built to 6 brick port? orange have settle and can take road easily with this 6/8 brick wood combi.
I get  2 knights, he gets rb and mono
